title: Better Decorations
description: This mod adds some cool decoration blocks to the game. Mostly non-functional.
body:
# Better Decorations

This is a simple mod that adds decorations to minecraft. Most of these are non-functional.

**This mod is currently in alpha. This means there will be bugs and unintentional behavior. If you come across any bugs, please report them to the issue tracker on GitHub.**

This mod currently has paper reams and plastic. More will be coming soon!

![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/basiccorruption/BetterDecorations?display_name=tag&style=flat-square&logo=github)
![GitHub release (latest by date)](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/basiccorruption/BetterDecorations?display_name=tag&include_prereleases&style=flat-square&logo=github)
